title: SynaptSourceRef
description: Evidence anchor linking an extracted item back to the source text.

snippet.description: Verbatim or near-verbatim text from the source.

offset_start.description: Character offset of the start of the evidence span (reserved for future use).

offset_end.description: Character offset of the end of the evidence span (reserved for future use).

sentence_index.description: Sentence index within the source text (reserved for future use).
